Video.summary: Everyone knows the biggest disasters happen under your own roof. Get ready, it's the Home Disaster Zone!
Video.title: Episode 9

Video.summary: Everyone knows the biggest disasters happen under your own roof. Get ready, it's the Home Disaster Zone!
Video.title: Episode 10

Video.summary: Ty Pennington guest stars for a “home deconstruction” episode featuring home repair fails and a custom trophy.
Video.title: Episode 1414

Video.summary: Ty Pennington guest stars with epic home repair fails and builds a trophy for the winner.
Video.title: Episode 1415

Video.summary: Videos include a cat sliding down a glass roof; a dog scared - of a shadow; and a woman falling into a shrub.
Video.title: Episode 611

Video.summary: A kid in a cookie costume falls; cats knock over a - Christmas tree; and an elephant runs from a squirrel.
Video.title: Episode 612

Video.summary: Dad falls in the kiddie pool; a bucket hits a man in the - head; and a dog dislikes - its ballet skirt.
Video.title: Episode 613

Video.summary: Highlights include a gymnast face planting on the mat; and water leaking from a ceiling into a toilet.
Video.title: Episode 614

Video.summary: A Grandpa flips off of a swing; - plus previous winners return to compete for the - $100,000 grand prize.
Video.title: Episode 616
